articles.title: Narsisti karttaa yhtä sanaa kuin ruttoa – ”Todella tyypillinen piirre”

articles.title: Kuvataide | Naistaiteilijuuden muotokuva on loistava mutta turhan tuttu

articles.title: Oil-Rich Saudi Arabia Isn’t Short on Energy. Here’s Why It Wants to Go Nuclear.
articles.description: Opponents warn that a U.S.-Saudi deal could be a step toward the kingdom building an atomic bomb. But there are other reasons for the world’s largest oil exporter to diversify its energy mix.

articles.title: Ecuador’s Carapaz wins Tour de France stage 18, Pogacar loses key climbing teammate
articles.description: Ecuador's ​Richard Carapaz scored a decisive win of the Tour de France at stage 18 on Thursday, securing victory in the final climb to Orcieres-Merlette. While Tadej Pogacar had previously maintained his overall lead, the Slovenian suffered a blow as key teammate Brandon McNulty abandoned the race.

articles.title: Zelensky’s Dizzying U-Turn Is the Latest Zigzag in a Presidency Full of Them

articles.title: France expected to name football legend Zinedine Zidane as Les Bleus' new coach
